title: WTF is this an evangelion
wikitext:
[]: WTF is this an evangelion             Quote Post by x-unknown-fail » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:12 am http://fc07.deviantart.net/fs22/f/2007/326/2/d/Eva_Unit_01_armorless_by_temukense.jpg WTF is This An eva....? O.O

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:16 am Yeah, a fanart of an EVA without armor.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:17 am By checking out the Newtype 100% Eva artbook and the Eva manga, yes, that's Unit-01 without the exoskeleton armor.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 19, 2010 10:42 am I can't remember his real name, but he was a user here a while back when this forum was over at Eva Monkey. He's popped in from time to time, but not often. http://forum.evageeks.org/profile.php?mode=viewprofile&u=22 You can also check out some of his other stuff: http://www.flickr.com/photos/88375159@N00/ He did a bunch of cool stuff, including an entire series of pieces for the mass produced Evas based upon their damage from the uber bitch fight in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 19, 2010 11:07 am It´s an Evangelion without the restraints and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Sep 19, 2010 12:24 pm Without the armor, Evangelions really look like bioengineered constructs.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Sep 19, 2010 1:26 pm Everyone calm down, it's just a nude photo of Jon Lovitz.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 19, 2010 2:58 pm Allemann wrote: Without the armor, Evangelions really look like bioengineered constructs.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 19, 2010 3:12 pm chee wrote: Everyone calm down, it's just a nude photo of Jon Lovitz.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 19, 2010 3:39 pm For some reason I kinda like the non armored version more.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Sep 19, 2010 5:52 pm I wouldn't mind sticking my lance in the unarmored Eva's core.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:17 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: THAT'S EVEN WORSE! Monkey : Thanks for the guy's flicker (I've seen his armor-less Eva-01 before on the forums.), it's nice to check out his other works. EDIT: He did this one? Whoa. http://www.flickr.com/photos/88375159@N00/485713904/in/photostream/ Always thought it was impressive.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Sep 20, 2010 12:17 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I wouldn't mind sticking my lance in the unarmored Eva's core.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Sep 20, 2010 12:23 am I'd be doing it for Instrumentality. If you read anything else into what I said, then that just proves that you have a filthy mind and probably sniff soiled panties while nobody's looking.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Mon Sep 20, 2010 9:09 am They are human tools formed in human image, or something like that Ritsuko said in episode 16. The problem I have with that fanart though is the mouth. Even when restrained the Evas can still move it and is not covered up.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 20, 2010 9:40 am Gamer137 wrote: The problem I have with that fanart though is the mouth. Even when restrained the Evas can still move it and is not covered up.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Sep 20, 2010 10:31 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It is not until later in the series that Unit 1 spontaneously generates a mouth to fulfill the needs of the story. Unit 02 similarly follows suit in The End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Mon Sep 20, 2010 10:58 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It is not until later in the series that Unit 1 spontaneously generates a mouth to fulfill the needs of the story. Unit 02 similarly follows suit in The End of Evangelion. When the artist did this piece of fanart, he decided to handle Unit 1 as it was handled during earlier episodes, without a mouth, so it's consistent with the show.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 20, 2010 12:14 pm Hawq wrote: I assume you mean later in terms of from the early design stages as Unit 1 clearly has a mouth in episode 2, unless it roars from somewhere other than a mouth somehow

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Sep 20, 2010 1:26 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I think when this was discussed years back, we agreed the most probable thing wasn't that the Evangelion spontaneously generated the mouth, but that the creators changed in mid-story to fit the needs of the narrative.
